page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Evolutionary Genetics and Genomics Library. EggLib is a C++/Python library and program package for evolutionary genetics and genomics. Main features are sequence data management, sequence polymorphism analysis, and coalescent simulations. EggLib is a flexible Python module with a performant underlying C++ library and allows fast and intuitive development of Python programs and scripts.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: EggLib is a C++/Python library and program package for evolutionary genetics and genomics. Main features are sequence data management, sequence polymorphism analysis, and coalescent simulations. EggLib is a flexible Python module with a performant underlying C++ library and allows fast and intuitive development of Python programs and scripts.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A python package for population genetics and genomics.
